data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁 #59
data.summary: [3/24 (Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-g
data.body:
[3/24 (Tue) Ban Notice]  

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system. 

▶ Total number of players banned: 16
▶ Period: Permanent 
▶ More details : https://t.co/O7GWKAv7iz
